SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, SAMMIH M. ARIKAT, SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 2306 MARKET #207, SAN FRANCISCO. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT ACTUAL PHYSICAL EVICTION SHALL NOT TAKE PLACE UNTIL 1-15-95. IF DEFENDANT, FRED SMITH VACATES ON OR BEFORE 1-15-95 AND LEAVES THE PREMISES CLEAN, HE SHALL BE PAID $150.00. ANY PROPERTY LEFT SHALL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF THE LANDLORD. THE BALANCE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSITE IS FORFEITED. ANY RENTAL DAMAGES ARE WAIVED. IF DEFENDANT, FRED SMITH, LEAVES BY 1-15-95, PLAINTIFF, SAMMIH ARIKAT, WILL DISMISS JUDGMENT WITH PREJUDICE. THE DISMISSAL FORM SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT BY DEFENDANT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, FRED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2306 MARKET STREET, APT. 207, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED
